document_title: Bangladesh Income Tax - Set Off and Carry Forward of Losses

chapters.title: Conditions, Procedures and Limitations of Carrying Forward of Losses

summary.description: Losses under business and profession, speculation business, capital gain, and agricultural income can be carried forward for 6 years.
Business losses excluding speculation business may be carried forward to offset future income from the same source.
Business loss can be carried forward only if the same business continues in later years.
Speculation business loss can only be set off against speculation business income.
Capital loss may be carried forward against future capital gains. Only loss exceeding Tk. 5,000 is eligible.
Agricultural income losses may be carried forward for 6 years against future agricultural income.
A successor otherwise than by inheritance cannot carry forward predecessor's business loss.

chapters.title: Set Off and Carry Forward of Business Losses

rules.business_loss: Business loss excluding speculation business may be set off against income from other sources except capital gain and house property.

chapters.title: Set Off and Carry Forward of Speculation Business Loss

rules.speculation_loss_setoff: Can only be set off against speculation business income.

definition_of_speculation_business.definition: Business where contracts are settled otherwise than by actual delivery.
exceptions: Hedging contracts for raw materials or merchandise
Stock/share contracts entered to guard against losses
Forward market or stock exchange arbitrage/jobbing transactions

chapters.title: Set Off and Carry Forward of Capital Gains Loss

rules.capital_loss_setoff: Can only be set off against income under the head capital gains.
rules.minimum_loss_requirement: Loss exceeding Tk. 5,000 only can be carried forward.

chapters.title: Set Off and Carry Forward of Agricultural Income Loss

rules.setoff: Agricultural loss may be set off against income from other sources except capital gain.
rules.future_adjustment: Can only be adjusted against agricultural income in future years.

chapters.title: Carry Forward of Losses of Partnership Firm

rules.description: Firm losses can only be set off against firm's own income.
Partners cannot set off firm losses against personal income.
Retired or deceased partner's share of loss cannot be set off by firm.

chapters.title: Carry Forward of Losses of a Joint Stock Company
rules: Loss from one business may be set off against another business.
Unadjusted loss can be carried forward for 6 years.
Company must be a resident assessee.
Foreign and local business losses may be cross-adjusted.
Losses of old companies cannot be carried forward after amalgamation.

chapters.title: Conditions and Limitations of Carry Forward of Loss
rules: Firm loss cannot be adjusted against partner income.
Partner cannot carry forward firm's losses.
Only the original person incurring loss or successor by inheritance can claim business loss adjustment.
Depreciation cannot create or increase business loss.
Business loss and speculation loss adjustment takes priority over depreciation.

chapters.title: Set Off and Carry Forward of Unabsorbed Depreciation
key_points: Depreciation cannot create negative business profit.
Only allowable depreciation up to profit amount may be charged.
Unabsorbed depreciation can be carried forward indefinitely.
Business loss and speculation loss are adjusted before unabsorbed depreciation.

chapters.title: Differences Between Business Loss and Unabsorbed Depreciation

differences.business_loss: Can be carried forward for 6 years.

differences.unabsorbed_depreciation: Can be adjusted against income under any head except capital gain and speculative profit.
Becomes part of next year's depreciation allowance.
